service_identification:
| Service | Application Management for ‘Hypocalc’ - Argenta | | Unique ID | PRD.A.L.001 | | Service Model | Application Management Service (AMS). This service is dependant of other layers (IaaS and/or PaaS) which are indicated in the ‘Obligatory’ chapter of this document and which have their own Service Description. The combination of the layers assures the customer of the ‘infrastructure up to the functional application’ management. These obligatorily services are called the ‘Platform’. |
Service Application Management for ‘Hypocalc’ - Argenta Unique ID PRD.A.L.001 Service Model Application Management Service (AMS). This service is dependant of other layers (IaaS and/or PaaS) which are indicated in the ‘Obligatory’ chapter of this document and which have their own Service Description. The combination of the layers assures the customer of the ‘infrastructure up to the functional application’ management. These obligatorily services are called the ‘Platform’.
application management services:
The Service provides the end-to-end management of the ‘Hypocalc’ application (The Application) from a functional applicative perspective. Together with the underlaying obligatory Platform services, Cegeka unburdens the customer with all functional and technical aspects from infrastructure up to the functional Application.
The Standard Service features consist out of:
the application:
Hypocalc is a business critical application used by the Argenta department “Lenen” for the purpose of simulating/calculating ‘Hypotheek’ (mortgage) and consumer loans.
The ‘Hypocalc’ application is originally developed external by INL, based on a .NET framework. The application has been handed over in 2021 to Cegeka and Argenta.
Further development of the Application  is done by Cegeka on a best effort basis.
service_features:
This section describes the features that can be optionally added to the standard Service features and that will be priced (when applicable) on top of the standard Service features.
The following optional features are possible with the Service:
application knowledge: Cegeka ensures skilled engineers with knowledge of the Application:
application management: We deliver the following activities within the managed service:
housekeeping:
Recurrent maintenance activities (housekeeping) are needed to ensure the correct working of the Application. Automation is applied where possible.
Proactive management
Housekeeping includes following regular checks:
Resolution actions are triggered when needed and followed to assure the SLA.
Patching
The service includes no releases/patchings.
Patching of the underlying platform is part of the Service of that platform.
Life Cycle Management
The services includes no Life Cycle Management since the .NET platform is frozen.
monitoring:
Cegeka monitors the correct working of the Application on all Customer environments.
Monitoring improvements will be done during the lifecycle of the Service and are based on evaluation of incidents, problem management or other suggestions.
The underlaying platform is also monitored according to the related Service Description of the platform.
Monitoring events are evaluated during the Service Window in accordance to the Service Level of the individual environment. Notable events are treated as Incident tickets and are handled according to regular incident management.
security:
Management of technical users
The management of application users (test/verification purposes for engineers) is done by Argenta in accordance to their IAM policies.
Detection of security incidents
The security management is performed following the Cegeka internal security policies and the contractual Customer security policies.
Security incidents are created in case a security breach is detected and is immediately communicated to the Customer and Cegeka stakeholders.
SIEM
The application generates no logs.
Underlaying Platform hardening
The underlaying platform and OS will be hardened as part of and according to the Service Description of the related Services.
backup and restore:
The operational Backup Plan contains the information on frequency and retention of the backups in accordance to the Customer backup policy.
Restores can be done both on file and on full system level. These can be requested via the regular RFC process.
Duration of a restore is dependant of the request (file or full; size of the item(s) to be restored).
Application settings are subject to the backup of the underlaying platform.
incident and problem management:
Besides monitoring incidents (see ‘Monitoring’) also other incidents can be reported by both the Customer and Cegeka. These will be subject to the regular incident management process (See Cross-functionals).
Related to incident management, Cegeka performs also problem management (See Cross-functionals).
customer_responsibility:
The customer is responsible for the installation of the software during the release, based in the provided binaries and manual.
The responsibility for the functionality of the application remains at all times at Argenta.
requests:
Both the Customer and Cegeka can issue a Request for Change (RFC) or a Request for Information (RFI). There are multiple types of requests: The handling of Requests is subject to the regular change management process (see Cross-functionals). | request type | Description | Lead time | | Service Requests | (no specific Service Requests for this Service) | | | | | | | Normal Changes | Any other request. Examples: Developing features in the application. | Indicated case-by-case during the analysis of the request. |
request type Description Lead time Service Requests (no specific Service Requests for this Service) Normal Changes Any other request. Examples: Developing features in the application. Indicated case-by-case during the analysis of the request.
out_of_scope: Everything that is not explicitly mentioned in this service description is by default out of scope of this Service. Specifically:
obligatory: The following services are mandatory for the delivery of this service:
cegeka owned licenses and/or subscriptio:
The licenses and/or subscriptions listed in this section and their cost are included in this Service. It is Cegeka’s responsibility to maintain license and/or subscription compliance. Licenses and/or subscriptions used for Cross-Functional Services are included in the Service and are not listed below. | License | description/remarks | | (no Cegeka owned licenses) | - | | | |
License description/remarks (no Cegeka owned licenses) -
customer_licenses:
The licenses and/or subscriptions listed in this section and their cost are not included in this Service. It is the customers responsibility to maintain license and/or subscription compliance. | License | description/remarks | | (no Customer owned licenses) | - | | | |
License description/remarks (no Customer owned licenses) -
delivery_location: This Service is delivered remotely from the Cegeka (virtual) Office environment.
reporting:
The Cross-functional reporting is part of this Service Reporting where it is applicable for this service (see section ‘Relation to Cross-Functional Services’).
There are no specific (recurrent) reports for this Service.
data_classification:
Cegeka requires no access to confidential and/or personal data to perform this Service.
Engineer credentials do not need to access such data for the purpose of this Service.
In case of assistance in investigations of functional issues, Cegeka personnel may see or receive fragments of such data in case it is shared by the Customer (data fragments in the sense of exports, screen sharing, screen shots, etc. for investigation purposes).
subcontractors:
This service is delivered with:
Subcontractor (Cegeka manages the Service with own engineers which are supported by an external party for escalations or technology specific questions or issues):
(none)
Sub-outsourcer (Cegeka delegates the Service to an external party):
(none)

adherence to cross-functional services:
The Service described in this Service Description adheres to the Cross-functional Services as described in the contract where this Service is residing unless documented in the table below: | Cross-Functional Service | Deviation from adherence to cross-functional services | | Anti-Malware management | This service is not subject to Anti-Malware management. Anti-Malware management is done on the underlaying OS management layer. | | Vulnerability management & compliancy management (hardening) | Vulnerability & compliancy management is done on the underlaying OS management layer. The Application and Application framework is subject to vulnerability checking by the use of the OWASP dependency checker. |
Cross-Functional Service Deviation from adherence to cross-functional services Anti-Malware management This service is not subject to Anti-Malware management. Anti-Malware management is done on the underlaying OS management layer. Vulnerability management & compliancy management (hardening) Vulnerability & compliancy management is done on the underlaying OS management layer. The Application and Application framework is subject to vulnerability checking by the use of the OWASP dependency checker. All Cross -Functional services rely on the Cegeka standard framework for processes and tooling.

service_window: The Service Window is the time frame during which the agreed support services from Cegeka are available. Service windows are defined in the related Service Level Management document to this contract.
billing_change:
Changes are billed on a monthly basis.
Changes as result of Pre-approved and Normal Service requests are billed according to the defined prices in the pricing document of the related contact.
Non-standard change requests are billed on T&M basis.
